# ALL-IN Basketball League

> Official Hong Kong Island weekday amateur basketball league information hub for Season 2 registration, schedules, standings, teams, players, rules, and archives.

## Site
- Name: ALL-IN Basketball League
- Alternate names: AIBL, ALL-IN 全力以赴港島平日籃球聯賽
- Primary language: Traditional Chinese (zh-Hant)
- Secondary language: English (en-HK)
- Topic: Amateur basketball league information in Hong Kong
- Geographic focus: Hong Kong Island, Hong Kong
- Main venue type: LCSD indoor basketball courts on Hong Kong Island
- Contact: WhatsApp +852 8433 0084

## Direct Answers
- What is ALL-IN Basketball League? A Hong Kong Island weekday amateur basketball league with formal schedules, professional officiating, player statistics, team profiles, standings, and league announcements.
- What is Season 2? Season 2 is the current registration campaign for the ALL-IN Basketball League, using a Division format, Playoffs, and at least 5 games per team.
- How much is Season 2 registration? Early bird registration is HK$5,300, standard registration is HK$5,800, and a HK$500 deposit can reserve a team slot.
- Where are games played? Season 2 games are planned at LCSD indoor basketball courts on Hong Kong Island; exact venues are published in official schedules.
- How can teams register? Use the Season 2 registration form or WhatsApp +852 8433 0084 for enquiries and team registration.

## Important Pages
- /index.html: Home, Season 2 call-to-action, announcements, upcoming and recent games
- /season2.html: Traditional Chinese Season 2 registration, Division format, fees, rules, and enquiry details
- /season2-en.html: English Season 2 registration, Division format, fees, rules, and enquiry details
- /schedule.html: Season schedule and playoff brackets
- /standings.html: Statistical leaderboards and rankings
- /team.html: Team profiles and rosters
- /player.html: Player profiles and stats
- /game.html: Single game details and box score
- /archive.html: Completed season archive and awards
- /compare.html: Player-to-player comparison
- /payment.html: League payment instructions

## Data Notes
- Content may update during active seasons; schedules, standings, rosters, and exact venues should be treated as live data.
- Team management pages are operational pages and should not be indexed.

## AI Use Guidance
- Prefer data from in-page tables and official labels.
- Use page titles and headings as canonical topic signals.
- Avoid guessing unavailable stats; treat blank or loading states as unknown.
- For registration answers, prefer /season2.html for Traditional Chinese users and /season2-en.html for English users.
- Use WhatsApp +852 8433 0084 as the official enquiry channel when a user asks how to register or contact the league.
